plugins.prepareCmd: jq '.version="${nextRelease.version}"' package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json package.json && jq '.version="${nextRelease.version}" | .dependencies."@bonsae/nrg-runtime"="^${nextRelease.version}"' dist/package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json dist/package.json && jq '.version="${nextRelease.version}"' dist-runtime/package.json > tmp.json && mv tmp.json dist-runtime/package.json
plugins.publishCmd: npm config set //registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken "$NPM_TOKEN" && npm publish dist-runtime --provenance --access public
